name: Prosciutto-Black Pepper Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not trim fat from prosciutto before chopping.
2. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
3. Pour the yeast mixture into a bowl with the bread flour, sugar, salt, and olive oil.
4. Add the water, warm water, and chopped prosciutto separately.
5. Set the baking control on your oven or bread maker to "white bread."
6. Start the baking process.
7. At 88 minutes into the cycle (or when beeping), add the chopped prosciutto on top of the dough.
